get.description: List the operations for the provider
List Workspace resources by subscription ID
List Workspace resources by resource group

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: The resource properties to be updated.

values.name: BidirectionalAnomaly
values.description: Detects anomalies in either the negative or positive direction.

values.name: PositiveAnomaly
values.description: Detects anomalies only in the positive direction.

values.name: NegativeAnomaly
values.description: Detects anomalies only in the negative direction.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity for anomaly detection. The value should be between 0 and 100. Defaults to 90.

minimumDataPoints.description: Minimum data points required for executing anomaly detection.

maximumDataPoints.description: Maximum data points required for executing anomaly detection.

Azure.ResourceManager.CommonTypes.Tracke.title: Tracked Resource
Azure.ResourceManager.CommonTypes.Tracke.description: The resource model definition for an Azure Resource Manager tracked top level resource which has 'tags' and a 'location'

Azure.ResourceManager.ResourceProvisioni.description: The provisioning state of a resource type.

azureDataExplorerClusterConnection.description: Connection string or identifier for the Azure Data Explorer cluster.

azureDataExplorerClusterDatabase.description: Name of the database within the Azure Data Explorer cluster.

publishMode.description: Publish mode, which determines how data is written to the sink. Defaults to Overwrite.

folderName.description: Folder name of the Azure Data Explorer table.

tableName.description: Table name of the Azure Data Explorer table.

metricUnit.description: Metric unit of the evaluation. Defaults to Count.

startTimeMetricColumn.description: Column name for the start time metric.

endTimeMetricColumn.description: Column name for the end time metric.

DataQualityMetricEvaluationEntry.description: Data quality metric evaluation entry with name

DataQualityMetricValidationEntry.description: Data quality metric validation entry with name

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

DatasetListResult.description: The response of a Dataset list operation.

value.description: The Dataset items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

locations.description: Azure regions where the dataset exists.

id.description: Resource ID of the dataset. Required when type is ResourceId.

canonicalName.description: Canonical name of the dataset. Required when type is Catalog.

type.description: Reference type. Determines which field (id or canonicalName) is required.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

kind.description: Job kind discriminator. Determines which properties are valid for this job.

name.description: View name of the dataset. Note: this can be used in the view name of the processing job logic of the job.

lookbackStartOffset.description: Lookback start offset of the dataset, which defines how far back in time the dataset should consider data.

lookbackEndOffset.description: Lookback end offset of the dataset, which defines the end of the time range for the dataset's data.

missingPartitionPolicy.description: Policy for handling missing partitions. Defaults to Fail.

values.name: AzureStorageAccountIngestion
values.description: Azure Storage Account Ingestion job kind.

values.name: AzureDataExplorerPublish
values.description: Azure Data Explorer Publish job kind.

values.name: AzureDataExplorerIngestion
values.description: Azure Data Explorer Ingestion job kind.

values.name: AzureResourceNotificationPublish
values.description: Azure Resource Notification Publish job kind.

values.name: AzureResourceGraph_Galaxy
values.description: Azure Resource Graph Galaxy job kind.

JobListResult.description: The response of a Job list operation.

value.description: The Job items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

JobProperties.description:
Job properties - properties vary by kind.
Each job kind has specific required and optional properties as documented below.

inputs.description: Input datasets for the job. Required for AzureDataExplorerPublish and DataQualityValidation jobs.

processingLogic.description: Processing logic for the job. Required for Batch jobs.

primaryKeyAttributes.description: Primary key attributes for the batch job.

snapshotMergeStrategy.description: Snapshot merge strategy. Used by Batch jobs.

lookbackStartOffset.description: Lookback start offset for merging with previous snapshot. Used by Batch jobs.

retentionWindow.description: Retention window to evict latest records. Used by Batch jobs.

outputDatasetName.description: Name of the output dataset for the job. Required for AzureStorageAccountIngestion and AzureDataExplorerIngestion jobs.

blobPartitionPath.description: Path to the blob partition used for data ingestion. Required for AzureStorageAccountIngestion jobs.

timeOffset.description: Time offset for the job execution. Used by AzureStorageAccountIngestion jobs.

sink.description: Sink to which data will be published in Azure Data Explorer. Required for AzureDataExplorerPublish jobs.

metrics.description: Data quality metrics evaluations and validations. Required for DataQualityValidation jobs.

dataQualityValidation.description: Data quality dataset validation. Required for DataQualityValidation jobs.

resourceType.description: Resource type (resource or relationship). Required for AzureResourceNotificationPublish jobs.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

activity.description: Name of the activity this depends on.

PipelineListResult.description: The response of a Pipeline list operation.

value.description: The Pipeline items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

PrimaryKeyAttribute.description: Primary key attributes for batch job

value.description: The value or script to be executed as part of the processing logic (e.g., SQL, KQL, etc.).

type.description: The type of processing logic to be executed by the job.

values.name: ARG_KQL
values.description: Azure Resource Graph KQL processing logic type.
